mapper.update: UPDATE CERT_USER_TABLE SET CERT_STATUS = 'Revocation' WHERE CERT_STATUS = 'validity' AND IS_CORPORATION = #{isCorporation} AND BCID=#{bcid}
mapper.select: SELECT IRS_NUM AS IRS_NO FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND CUST_CD = #{companyCd}
SELECT CUST_NM AS VENDOR_NM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND CUST_CD = #{companyCd}
SELECT CASE MNG_YN WHEN '1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END SUPERUSERFLAG FROM STOCCVUR WHERE USER_ID=#{userId}

SELECT a.USER_ID , a.COMPANY_CD , a.USER_NM USER_NM , a.CELL_NUM CELL_NUM , CASE a.MNG_YN WHEN '1' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END SUPERUSERFLAG , b.CUST_NM , b.IRS_NUM FROM STOCCVUR a , STOCCUST b WHERE b.CUST_CD = a.COMPANY_CD AND a.USER_ID=#{userId}
